inputs.prompt:
CRITICAL: The woman in the output MUST be IDENTICAL to the woman in image1. Same exact face, facial features, skin tone, hair, and identity. Do not generate a different person.

The woman from image1 is wearing the exact outfit from image2. Preserve image2's exact color, design, pattern, cut, and details.

Pose: standing confidently, full body visible from head to toe, natural relaxed posture.

Scene: Manhattan rooftop at golden hour. New York City skyline in the background with tall skyscrapers silhouetted against warm amber sky. Empire State Building faintly visible.

Aesthetic: luxury editorial fashion, high-end magazine cover.
Mood: aspirational, chic, cosmopolitan.

Photography: shot on 50mm, full body editorial portrait. Camera at eye level, slightly off-center composition.
Lighting: warm golden-hour sunlight, soft rim light from behind, warm amber tones, long soft shadows, cinematic depth.

Preserve her face and identity from image1 exactly. Ultra-realistic, photorealistic, editorial fashion photography quality.
distorted face, different person, wrong outfit, blurry, deformed body, extra limbs, hat, sunglasses, jewelry, unwanted accessories
